steps.t: You should make your way north-west past the reeds in search of Gondorian defenders.
A soldier of Gondor greets you by the southern side of the burning Harlond, desperate hope written on his face.
Defenders of Gondor fought bravely against the assault of the Song, but were pushed back to a slope north-west of the Harlond, beyond the graveyard.
Borndir stands on the slope north-west of the burning Harlond, past the graveyard.
Borndir told you that King Elessar has gathered a number of soldiers on the overlook at the top of the sloping path north-west of the burning Harlond,…
King Elessar prepares for the counter-attack from the overlook north-west of the burning Harlond.
